name: Feral Slash
outcome: [AttackerName] suddenly lunges forwards with blinding speed, making [TargetName] yelp as [AttackerHeOrShe] slashes [TargetHimOrHer] with [AttackerHisOrHer] sharp, aphrodisiac-laced fingernails, and despite them not leaving a single cut on [TargetHisOrHer] skin, a strangely pleasant pain spreads from where [AttackerHeOrShe] struck...
miss: [AttackerName] suddenly lunges forwards with blinding speed, but [TargetName] manages to narrowly avoid [AttackerHisOrHer] wild swipes as [AttackerHeOrShe] staggers from the lack of resistance before turning to face [TargetHimOrHer] with a peeved expression.
statusOutcome: [TargetName] lets out a gasp as a potent aphrodisiac begins to course through [TargetHisOrHer] body!
